message:
test(colors): add automated color palette validation tests

Add comprehensive tests to validate color consistency across the codebase:
- No zinc-* colors (should use neutral-*)
- Indigo-* only in allowlisted files (Pro features)
- No arbitrary text sizes like text-[Npx]
- No green-* colors (should use emerald-*)

Tests found 1207 existing violations that serve as baseline for future
migration work. Tests run in Vitest and provide detailed logging.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
